channel.title: Document Foundation, The — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Document Foundation, The (document_fdn.).

item.title: CVE-2026-4430 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Heap Buffer Overflow in AgileEngine
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in The Document Foundation LibreOffice via crafted OOXML documents with mismatched encryption salt parameters. This issue affects LibreOffice: from 26.2 before 26.2.3, from 25.8 before 25.8.7.

item.title: CVE-2025-14714 · 0.9 LOW — TCC Bypass via Inherited Permissions in Bundled Interpreter
item.description: An Authentication Bypass vulnerability existed where the application bundled an interpreter (Python) that inherits the Transparency, Consent, and Control (TCC) permissions granted by the user to the main application bundle By executing the bundled in…

item.title: CVE-2025-2866 · 2.4 LOW — PDF signature forgery with adbe.pkcs7.sha1 SubFilter
item.description: Improper Verification of Cryptographic Signature vulnerability in LibreOffice allows PDF Signature Spoofing by Improper Validation. In the affected versions of LibreOffice a flaw in the verification code for adbe.pkcs7.sha1 signatures could cause inv…

item.title: CVE-2021-25635 · 5.2 MEDIUM — Content Manipulation with Certificate Validation Attack
item.description: An Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in LibreOffice allowed an attacker to self sign an ODF document, with a signature untrusted by the target, then modify it to change the signature algorithm to an invalid (or unknown to LibreOffice) alg…

item.title: CVE-2025-1080 · 7.2 HIGH — Macro URL arbitrary script execution
item.description: LibreOffice supports Office URI Schemes to enable browser integration of LibreOffice with MS SharePoint server. An additional scheme 'vnd.libreoffice.command' specific to LibreOffice was added. In the affected versions of LibreOffice a link in a brow…

item.title: CVE-2025-0514 · 7.2 HIGH — Executable hyperlink Windows path targets executed unconditionally on activation
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows Windows Executable hyperlink targets to be executed unconditionally on activation.This issue affects LibreOffice: from 24.8 before < 24.8.5.

item.title: CVE-2024-12426 · 6.7 MEDIUM — URL fetching can be used to exfiltrate arbitrary INI file values and environment variables
item.description: Exposure of Environmental Variables and arbitrary INI file values to an Unauthorized Actor vulnerability in The Document Foundation LibreOffice. URLs could be constructed which expanded environmental variables or INI file values, so potentially sensi…

item.title: CVE-2024-12425 · 2.4 LOW — Path traversal leading to arbitrary .ttf file write
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows Absolute Path Traversal. An attacker can write to arbitrary locations, albeit suffixed with ".ttf", by supplyin…

item.title: CVE-2024-7788 · 7.8 HIGH — Signatures in "repair mode" should not be trusted
item.description: Improper Digital Signature Invalidation vulnerability in Zip Repair Mode of The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows Signature forgery vulnerability in LibreOfficeThis issue affects LibreOffice: from 24.2 before < 24.2.5.

item.title: CVE-2024-6472 · 7.8 HIGH — Ability to trust not validated macro signatures removed in high security mode
item.description: Certificate Validation user interface in LibreOffice allows potential vulnerability. Signed macros are scripts that have been digitally signed by the developer using a cryptographic signature. When a document with a signed macro is opened a warning i…

item.title: CVE-2024-5261 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — TLS certificate are not properly verified when utilizing LibreOfficeKit
item.description: Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in LibreOffice "LibreOfficeKit" mode disables TLS certification verification LibreOfficeKit can be used for accessing LibreOffice functionality through C/C++. Typically this is used by third party compone…

item.title: CVE-2024-3044 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Graphic on-click binding allows unchecked script execution
item.description: Unchecked script execution in Graphic on-click binding in affected LibreOffice versions allows an attacker to create a document which without prompt will execute scripts built-into LibreOffice on clicking a graphic. Such scripts were previously deeme…

item.title: CVE-2023-6186 · 8.3 HIGH — Link targets allow arbitrary script execution
item.description: Insufficient macro permission validation of The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows an attacker to execute built-in macros without warning. In affected versions LibreOffice supports hyperlinks with macro or similar built-in command targets that ca…

item.title: CVE-2023-6185 · 8.3 HIGH — Improper input validation enabling arbitrary Gstreamer pipeline injection
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in GStreamer integration of The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows an attacker to execute arbitrary GStreamer plugins. In affected versions the filename of the embedded video is not sufficiently escaped whe…

item.title: CVE-2023-2255 — Remote documents loaded without prompt via IFrame
item.description: Improper access control in editor components of The Document Foundation LibreOffice allowed an attacker to craft a document that would cause external links to be loaded without prompt. In the affected versions of LibreOffice documents that used "floa…

item.title: CVE-2023-0950 · 7.8 HIGH — Array Index UnderFlow in Calc Formula Parsing
item.description: Improper Validation of Array Index vulnerability in the spreadsheet component of The Document Foundation LibreOffice allows an attacker to craft a spreadsheet document that will cause an array index underflow when loaded. In the affected versions of…

item.title: CVE-2022-3140 — Macro URL arbitrary script execution
item.description: LibreOffice supports Office URI Schemes to enable browser integration of LibreOffice with MS SharePoint server. An additional scheme 'vnd.libreoffice.command' specific to LibreOffice was added. In the affected versions of LibreOffice links using that…

item.title: CVE-2022-26307 — Weak Master Keys
item.description: LibreOffice supports the storage of passwords for web connections in the user’s configuration database. The stored passwords are encrypted with a single master key provided by the user. A flaw in LibreOffice existed where master key was poorly encode…

item.title: CVE-2022-26306 — Execution of Untrusted Macros Due to Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: LibreOffice supports the storage of passwords for web connections in the user’s configuration database. The stored passwords are encrypted with a single master key provided by the user. A flaw in LibreOffice existed where the required initialization…

item.title: CVE-2022-26305 — Execution of Untrusted Macros Due to Improper Certificate Validation
item.description: An Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in LibreOffice existed where determining if a macro was signed by a trusted author was done by only matching the serial number and issuer string of the used certificate with that of a trusted certifica…

item.title: CVE-2021-25636 — Incorrect trust validation of signature with ambiguous KeyInfo children
item.description: LibreOffice supports digital signatures of ODF documents and macros within documents, presenting visual aids that no alteration of the document occurred since the last signing and that the signature is valid. An Improper Certificate Validation vulner…

item.title: CVE-2021-25634 — Timestamp Manipulation with Signature Wrapping
item.description: LibreOffice supports digital signatures of ODF documents and macros within documents, presenting visual aids that no alteration of the document occurred since the last signing and that the signature is valid. An Improper Certificate Validation vulner…

item.title: CVE-2021-25633 — Content Manipulation with Double Certificate Attack
item.description: LibreOffice supports digital signatures of ODF documents and macros within documents, presenting visual aids that no alteration of the document occurred since the last signing and that the signature is valid. An Improper Certificate Validation vulner…

item.title: CVE-2021-25631 — denylist of executable filename extensions possible to bypass under windows
item.description: In the LibreOffice 7-1 series in versions prior to 7.1.2, and in the 7-0 series in versions prior to 7.0.5, the denylist can be circumvented by manipulating the link so it doesn't match the denylist but results in ShellExecute attempting to launch an…

item.title: CVE-2021-25630
item.description: "loolforkit" is a privileged program that is supposed to be run by a special, non-privileged "lool" user. Before doing anything else "loolforkit" checks, if it was invoked by the "lool" user, and refuses to run with privileges, if it's not the case.…

item.title: CVE-2020-12803 — XForms submissions could overwrite local files
item.description: ODF documents can contain forms to be filled out by the user. Similar to HTML forms, the contained form data can be submitted to a URI, for example, to an external web server. To create submittable forms, ODF implements the XForms W3C standard, which…

item.title: CVE-2020-12802 — remote graphics contained in docx format retrieved in 'stealth mode'
item.description: LibreOffice has a 'stealth mode' in which only documents from locations deemed 'trusted' are allowed to retrieve remote resources. This mode is not the default mode, but can be enabled by users who want to disable LibreOffice's ability to include rem…

item.title: CVE-2020-12801 — Crash-recovered MSOffice encrypted documents defaulted to not to using encryption on next save
item.description: If LibreOffice has an encrypted document open and crashes, that document is auto-saved encrypted. On restart, LibreOffice offers to restore the document and prompts for the password to decrypt it. If the recovery is successful, and if the file format…

item.title: CVE-2019-9853 — Insufficient URL decoding flaw in categorizing macro location
item.description: LibreOffice documents can contain macros. The execution of those macros is controlled by the document security settings, typically execution of macros are blocked by default. A URL decoding flaw existed in how the urls to the macros within the docume…

item.title: CVE-2019-9855 — Windows 8.3 path equivalence handling flaw allows LibreLogo script execution
item.description: LibreOffice is typically bundled with LibreLogo, a programmable turtle vector graphics script, which can execute arbitrary python commands contained with the document it is launched from. LibreOffice also has a feature where documents can specify tha…

item.title: CVE-2019-9854 — Unsafe URL assembly flaw in allowed script location check
item.description: LibreOffice has a feature where documents can specify that pre-installed macros can be executed on various script events such as mouse-over, document-open etc. Access is intended to be restricted to scripts under the share/Scripts/python, user/Script…

item.title: CVE-2019-9852 — Insufficient URL encoding flaw in allowed script location check
item.description: LibreOffice has a feature where documents can specify that pre-installed macros can be executed on various script events such as mouse-over, document-open etc. Access is intended to be restricted to scripts under the share/Scripts/python, user/Script…

item.title: CVE-2019-9851 — LibreLogo global-event script execution
item.description: LibreOffice is typically bundled with LibreLogo, a programmable turtle vector graphics script, which can execute arbitrary python commands contained with the document it is launched from. Protection was added, to address CVE-2019-9848, to block calli…

item.title: CVE-2019-9850 — Insufficient url validation allowing LibreLogo script execution
item.description: LibreOffice is typically bundled with LibreLogo, a programmable turtle vector graphics script, which can execute arbitrary python commands contained with the document it is launched from. LibreOffice also has a feature where documents can specify tha…

item.title: CVE-2019-9849
item.description: LibreOffice has a 'stealth mode' in which only documents from locations deemed 'trusted' are allowed to retrieve remote resources. This mode is not the default mode, but can be enabled by users who want to disable LibreOffice's ability to include rem…

item.title: CVE-2019-9848
item.description: LibreOffice has a feature where documents can specify that pre-installed scripts can be executed on various document events such as mouse-over, etc. LibreOffice is typically also bundled with LibreLogo, a programmable turtle vector graphics script, w…

item.title: CVE-2019-9847 — Executable hyperlink targets executed unconditionally on activation
item.description: A vulnerability in LibreOffice hyperlink processing allows an attacker to construct documents containing hyperlinks pointing to the location of an executable on the target users file system. If the hyperlink is activated by the victim the executable…
